sections.paragraph:
πρίων1

I. a sawyer, Ar.

II. a saw, Soph.; πρίων ὀδόντων a saw of teeth, i. e. a jagged row, Anth.; v. πρίων2.


Etym. ῑ, attic; but ῐ in later Poets.
πρίων2

a comic Noun, formed from πρίω, imperat. of ἐπριάμην, with a pun upon πρίων, a saw, ὁ πρ. ἀπῆν that rasping word "buy" was unknown, Ar.
